title: Are the Monday API developer docs down?
excerpt:
I’m trying to access the Monday API docs, but everything under the API Reference section is showing up with a 404 error. 

For example, Items page

posts.author: nlanziner (Natasha Lanziner)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to access the Monday API docs, but everything under the API Reference section is showing up with a 404 error.

GraphQL API

monday.com GraphQL API

The monday GraphQL API allows developers to programmatically access and update data inside a monday.com account. It is part of the monday apps framework.

For example, Items page

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @nlanziner,

We were updating some of the documentation navigation behind the scenes, and the docs went down for about 10 minutes yesterday. We immediately reverted the changes, and things should be working properly. We apologize for the outage you experienced!

Please let us know if you experience any other issues or have any questions.

Best,
Rachel
